hooks.name: pre-commit-gate-no-verify-block
hooks.on_match: [hook:pre-commit-gate] --no-verify is prohibited on the Chimera project.

hooks.name: pre-commit-gate
hooks.run: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
hooks.on_failure: [hook:pre-commit-gate] Gate failed. Fix the above errors and retry.
